title: Worst Couples
wikitext:
[]: Worst Couples             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Fri Jul 14, 2006 11:25 pm Everyone has their favorite Eva and anime pairings....but what are the worst couples you can think of? Both inside, outside of Eva and crossover pairings?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Jul 15, 2006 12:05 am Neon Genesis Evangelion and Aaron Clark.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sat Jul 15, 2006 12:35 am The Eva Monkey wrote: Neon Genesis Evangelion and Aaron Clark.

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Sat Jul 15, 2006 12:40 am Rei/Shinji because it's freakin incest SEELE 11 "Vlad"should never be paired with anything anytime anywhere! Though i've seen some pairing with him.....that caused my eyes to bleed. Gendo/Kozo Kaji/Kaworu

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Jul 15, 2006 2:18 am I suppose the Maya/♂ are the ones I like least. Apart, that is, from S/A (as argued at length why it would be a Bad Thing) which is usually accompanied by one or other being completely OOC, the circumstances are important. Frex, Kaji/Gendo in abstract (or in the types of doujin that appear on /male) may not be everyone's cup of tea, but it freaking hilarious in context in Misato's Predicament . SEELE 08 wrote: Rei/Shinji because it's freakin rishathra

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Sat Jul 15, 2006 2:29 am Worst pairing? Heh, they're all bad. AsukaxKaworu-Though it sounds sweet, I can't see WHY they'd ever hook up. What with Kaworu being an Angel, and Asuka being mad at Kaworu for stealing her piloting rights, the only thing that Asuka would do to Kaworu involving a bed is smash his skull against the bed-post. Seriously, PenPenxAnyFemale is like the only pairing that works. All others suck.

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Sat Jul 15, 2006 2:43 am Mr. Tines wrote: I suppose the Maya/♂ are the ones I like least. Apart, that is, from S/A (as argued at length why it would be a Bad Thing) which is usually accompanied by one or other being completely OOC, the circumstances are important. Frex, Kaji/Gendo in abstract (or in the types of doujin that appear on /male) may not be everyone's cup of tea, but it freaking hilarious in context in Misato's Predicament . SEELE 08 wrote: Rei/Shinji because it's freakin rishathra

[]:             Quote Post by Takumi Fujiwara » Sat Jul 15, 2006 3:06 am GendouXShinji Oh yeah. I went there.

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Sat Jul 15, 2006 3:10 am Takumi Fujiwara wrote: GendouXShinji Oh yeah. I went there.

[]:             Quote Post by xiuxiu » Sat Jul 15, 2006 3:53 am touji and hikari. or toji and anyone. i don't like toji very much. hikari is too good for him.

[]:             Quote Post by PilotIkari » Sat Jul 15, 2006 4:43 am Gendou/Rei: *shudders* there's only one Ikari for her and it's not Gendou. Kaworu/Rei: See above Anyone/Pen-Pen: Sorry Pen, but interspecies just ain't cool

[]:             Quote Post by Eternal Yamcha » Sat Jul 15, 2006 4:49 am Eternal Yamcha/Any Woman Or Eternal Yamcha/Asuka Don't forget Eternal Yamcha/Any other human And finally Eternal Yamcha/Eternal Yamcha That last one is the worst. Damn you Eternal Yamcha! DAMN YOU TO HELL!!! ...In all reality... Maya/Ritsuko... Or Maya/Gendo... I could see Maya getting hurt in those relationships and she's just too damn cute. It'd ruin me.

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Sat Jul 15, 2006 4:57 am Naoko/Anyone Anything Anytime Anywhere

[]:             Quote Post by Eternal Yamcha » Sat Jul 15, 2006 5:38 am For any of you Kaworu/Shinji fans out there... Here's my reason why the two should never be together... My reason why the two of them should NEVER get together

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Sat Jul 15, 2006 5:48 am Eternal Yamcha wrote: For any of you Kaworu/Shinji fans out there... Here's my reason why the two should never be together... My reason why the two of them should NEVER get together

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Sat Jul 15, 2006 5:57 am Shinji and Rei of course! *big A/S pairing right here!*

[]:             Quote Post by Alfonso » Sat Jul 15, 2006 6:48 am SEELE 08 wrote: Naoko/Anyone Anything Anytime Anywhere

[]:             Quote Post by Trowa_Ayanami » Sat Jul 15, 2006 9:03 am Shinji/Asuka: *grimaces* Seriously, I cannot stand that couple, at all!!

[]:             Quote Post by Light of the Dawn » Sat Jul 15, 2006 9:19 am Gendo/Naoko - Because I hate them both. Gendo/Ritsuko - Same. Kaji/Misato - I don't like Kaji. Asuka/Rei - Let's face it, this is just STUPID. Touji/Rei - Hilarious.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Sat Jul 15, 2006 10:14 am Light of the Dawn wrote: Kaji/Misato - I don't like Kaji.
